instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `do-times-safe` that iterates a user-named variable from 0 below the limit, evaluating the limit expression exactly once before the loop begins.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 (COMPUTE-BOUND)))
            (DOTIMES (I #:G1) (USE I)))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 (COMPUTE-BOUND)))
            (DOTIMES (I #:G112) (USE I)))

--- stderr ---
